name: patch-moi
description: Git-first patch-work control plane for patch stacks on top of upstream projects.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, maintain, and inspect Git patch stacks with safe local tooling.
interface.longDescription: patch.moi helps operators track feature work, inspect upstream remotes, inspect local patch branches, read DATA_DIR state, and dry-run named workspace automation before patch work begins. Local mode is read-mostly by default, with fetch and mutation tools gated by explicit policy.
defaultPrompt: Dry-run the latest upstream release automation.
Triage a failed patch.moi patch attempt.
